decisions.decision: Changed Alpha Vantage symbols from index symbols (DJI/NASDAQ/SPX) to ETF proxies (DIA/QQQ/SPY)
decisions.rationale: TIME_SERIES_DAILY API doesn't support index symbols directly

decisions.decision: Fixed BLS CPI series IDs from incorrect (CUSR0000SEF/CUSR0000SEB) to correct (CUSR0000SAF/CUSR0000SA0E)
decisions.rationale: BLS API returned 'Series does not exist' for incorrect IDs

decisions.decision: Changed OverlayPanel from cascade-blocking to partial-data-display
decisions.rationale: Original design blocked on any loading source, preventing useful data display

next_action: Resume UAT test 3 (WebSocket Reconnection) after user clears browser cache. If CPI still spins, diagnose React Query state.
context_notes: UAT testing session. Multiple API fixes committed. CPI panel issue likely React Query cache - curl shows API working correctly. Console shows all API calls executing without errors. User needs to clear browser storage and retry.
